promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the sim_suite_v1 descendant-provenance reduction and as the next raw-order successor bundle before the deferred Stage16 mix-control family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact seams needed for second-pass reduction: coherent seven-descendant emission, full repo-top evidence coverage with zero current-v2 hash matches, dedicated-runner externalization, predecessor-bundle operator4 crossover, Stage16 V5 byte-identity drift, malformed or foreign Negctrl provenance, and the explicit next-family boundary.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary reduction was used for the nearest evidence-coverage versus provenance-admission comparison, the sim_suite_v1 reduction was used for predecessor-bundle crossover and bundle-boundary contrast, and the oprole8 reduction was used for the nearest operator4 evidence-hash versus current-emitter mismatch pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly preserves the Stage16 mix-control family as the next separate raw-order family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent sim_suite_v2 intake batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, sim_suite_v1 reduction, and oprole8 reduction were sufficient to isolate successor emission identity, zero current-hash attribution, dedicated-runner externalization, operator4 crossover, and the Stage16/Negctrl provenance anomalies.

candidate_items.name: SIM_SUITE_V2_SEVEN_DESCENDANT_SUCCESSOR_EMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves sim_suite_v2 as the current successor emitter of seven stored descendants.

candidate_items.name: ALL_SEVEN_EVIDENCED_WITH_ZERO_CURRENT_V2_HASH_MATCHES_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's central contradiction: full evidence coverage with no repo-top uses of the current successor-bundle hash.

candidate_items.name: DEDICATED_RUNNER_EXTERNALIZATION_TRIO_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves Topology4, Axis4, and Axis0 V5 as emitted-here but currently evidenced under dedicated runner hashes.

candidate_items.name: OPERATOR4_PREDECESSOR_BUNDLE_CROSSOVER_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves operator4 as the clearest cross-bundle provenance overlap between sim_suite_v2 emission and sim_suite_v1 current repo-top attribution.

candidate_items.name: STAGE16_V5_BYTE_IDENTITY_UNDER_MEGA_HASH_PROVENANCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves Stage16 V5 as a version-and-provenance drift packet without payload change.

candidate_items.name: NEGCTRL_FOREIGN_AND_ZERO_HASH_PROVENANCE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest malformed and cross-family provenance residues in the successor bundle without normalizing them.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_SUITE_V2_AS_CURRENT_TOPLEVEL_PRODUCER_FOR_ALL_SEVEN_DESCENDANTS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves zero repo-top uses of the current successor-bundle hash.

quarantined_items.name: DEDICATED_CURRENT_PROVENANCE_AS_ERASURE_OF_SUCCESSOR_EMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Current externalized provenance does not erase direct successor-bundle emission of those descendants.

quarantined_items.name: OPERATOR4_AS_CLEAN_V1_TO_V2_UPGRADE_PRODUCER_PATH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves current repo-top attribution back to the predecessor bundle hash rather than one clean upgrade path.

quarantined_items.name: STAGE16_V5_LABEL_AS_PAYLOAD_CHANGE_OR_CLEANER_PROVENANCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves byte identity against V4 and attribution to the mega-script hash.

quarantined_items.name: NEGCTRL_ZERO_OR_FOREIGN_HASHES_AS_TRUSTWORTHY_PRODUCER_PROVENANCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: All-zero and cross-family hashes remain contradictory provenance forms rather than trustworthy current producer paths.

quarantined_items.name: SIM_SUITE_V2_AND_STAGE16_MIX_CONTROL_AS_ONE_BOUNDED_FAMILY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves a clean boundary before the next Stage16 family begins.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: seven-descendant successor emission identity, full evidence coverage with zero current-v2 hash matches, dedicated-runner externalization, operator4 predecessor crossover, Stage16 byte-identity drift, and malformed or foreign Negctrl provenance.
They preserve sim_suite_v2 as a bounded current emitter without letting that executable fact overstate current repo-top producer attribution for any emitted descendant.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later successor-bundle lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain producer-path overreads, emission-erasure overreads, clean-upgrade overreads, version-label overreads, malformed-hash overreads, or adjacency-merging overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the sims evidence-boundary reduction, sim_suite_v1 reduction, and oprole8 reduction as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded sim_suite_v2 externalized-provenance reduction pass.
